prompt: Create a department called Engineering and then hire employee Lars Olsen (lars.olsen@example.com) into it.
notes: Strict sequencing: department before employee. Fresh sandbox: POST dept + GET employee (dedup) + POST employee = 3. Dirty sandbox: 2 (employee already exists).

prompt: Cree una dimensión contable personalizada "Region" con los valores "Nord-Norge" y "Vestlandet". Luego registre un asiento en la cuenta 7100 por 34350 NOK, vinculado al valor de dimensión "Nord-Norge".
notes: Competition prompt. Custom accounting dimension with values, then voucher linked to dimension value. LLM parses as single combined entity. Must use unknown handler (generic agent). Agentic handler has high variability — custom dimensions require multiple exploration calls.

prompt: O cliente Estrela Lda (org. nº 977023211) tem uma fatura pendente de 13650 NOK sem IVA por "Design web". Registe o pagamento total desta fatura.
notes: Competition prompt. Invoice ALREADY EXISTS in sandbox ('tem uma fatura pendente' = has a pending invoice). Must NOT create a new invoice. Only register payment.

prompt: Crie uma fatura para o cliente Montanha Lda (org. nº 970481389) com três linhas de produto: Horas de consultoria (8659) a 21850 NOK com 25 % IVA, Relatório de análise (2341) a 11250 NOK com 15 % IVA (alimentos), e Manutenção (1043) a 9250 NOK com 0 % IVA (isento).
notes: Competition prompt. Multi-line invoice with 3 products at different VAT rates (25%, 15%, 0%). Products have specific numbers. Products may already exist in sandbox.

prompt: Create employee Maria Svensson (maria.svensson@example.com) as an administrator in Tripletex.
notes: Tests admin role detection. Employee created with EXTENDED access, entitlement granted directly. Dirty sandbox: 5 calls (skips entitlement if userType write-once).

prompt: Opprett ansatt Erik Hansen (erik.hansen@example.com) med administratorrettigheter.
notes: Norwegian admin role detection test. Employee created with EXTENDED access, entitlement granted directly. Dirty sandbox: 5 calls (skips entitlement if userType write-once).

prompt: Erstellen Sie das Projekt "Analyse Windkraft" verknüpft mit dem Kunden Windkraft GmbH (Org.-Nr. 897356171). Projektleiter ist Finn Richter (finn.richter@example.org).
notes: Tests project manager resolution from created employee. PM entitlement has dependencies (AUTH_CREATE_PROJECT). In dirty sandbox, existing employee may lack EXTENDED (write-once). Fresh sandbox: ~8 calls, 0 errors.
